description: Complete agentic shopping assistant workflow. Import into IBM Langflow to visualise and run the multi-agent pipeline.

nodes.label: User Input
nodes.description: Accepts natural language queries from the frontend

nodes.label: Intent Classifier
nodes.description: Classifies user intent: knowledge / comparison / review / prediction / recommendation / sustainability / multimodal / assistant

nodes.label: IBM Orchestrate Orchestrator
nodes.description: Central router that delegates to the appropriate agent(s) based on detected intent. Implements IBM Orchestrate task routing.

nodes.label: RAG Retriever (ChromaDB)
nodes.description: Retrieves relevant shopping knowledge from ChromaDB vector store. Uses sentence-transformers embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2).

nodes.label: Agent 1: Shopping Knowledge
nodes.description: Answers shopping questions using RAG + IBM Granite

nodes.label: Agent 2: Product Comparison
nodes.description: Compares multiple products with AI analysis

nodes.label: Agent 4: Predictive Shopping
nodes.description: Price trend analysis + buy timing advice

nodes.label: Agent 6: Sustainability
nodes.description: Eco scores, carbon impact, green alternatives

nodes.label: Agent 7: Multimodal Search
nodes.description: Text, image, and voice product search

nodes.label: IBM Granite LLM
nodes.description: IBM watsonx.ai Granite model inference. All agents funnel through this node.

nodes.label: Response Formatter
nodes.description: Formats the Granite response for the frontend. Adds agent metadata, intent tag, and timestamp.

nodes.label: Frontend Output
nodes.description: Returns structured JSON to the Flask API endpoint

ibm_orchestrate_integration.description: IBM Orchestrate skills registered from this workflow

automations.name: Price Alert Automation
automations.description: Trigger when product price drops below target

automations.name: Fake Review Monitor
automations.description: Monitor new reviews for fake indicators

langflow_import_instructions: 1. Open IBM Langflow in your browser
2. Click 'Import' and select this langflow_workflow.json file
3. Set your IBM watsonx.ai API key in the IBM Granite node settings
4. Set your ChromaDB path in the RAG Retriever node
5. Click 'Run' to test the full agentic pipeline
6. Connect the Output node to your Flask API endpoint
